metadata.title: About | roda.dev
metadata.description: Gabriel Roda, front-end developer focused on digital education, product, and learning experiences.

hero.name: Gabriel Roda
hero.role: Front-end developer focused on education and digital product.
hero.intro: Front-end developer passionate about education, with 6 years building materials and platforms designed to improve learning and access to education for thousands of higher education students in Brazil.

focus.title: Interfaces and platforms that need to be clear, useful, and easy to evolve.

items.title: Front-end with product context
items.description: Working close to the problem, thinking not only about the interface but also the flow, the clarity of the experience, and what helps the product mature.

items.title: Digital education and learning experiences
items.description: Building materials, platforms, and interactions for reading, studying, authoring, and discovering content in educational environments.

items.title: Tools for content teams
items.description: Creating solutions that speed up internal production, organize processes, and reduce the need for technical knowledge when publishing materials.

career.title: A quick read of the areas where I have been working.

closing.title: If it makes sense for what you are building, let's talk.
closing.description: I can contribute with front-end, educational product work, authoring, internal platforms, and digital experiences focused on clarity.
